_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: Visual inspection shows that spatial distributions were similar between CON and NF1 in all frequency bands, but with greater magnitudes in NF1 relative to CON
details: Successfully processed EEG data and computed spectral power analyses, enabling detection of significant group differences in multiple frequency bands
